Class TeeInputOutput.TeeOutputWriter

java.lang.Object
java.io.Writer
java.io.PrintWriter
org.openide.windows.OutputWriter
uno.anahata.asi.nb.util.TeeInputOutput.TeeOutputWriter
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, Flushable, Appendable, AutoCloseable
Enclosing class:
TeeInputOutput
private static class TeeInputOutput.TeeOutputWriter extends org.openide.windows.OutputWriter
A specialized OutputWriter that writes to two different Writer instances simultaneously.
Author:
anahata

  • Field Details

    • w1

      private final Writer w1
      The primary destination writer (typically delegate.getOut() or getErr()).

    • w2

      private final Writer w2
      The secondary destination writer (the internal string buffer).

    • errorOccurred

      private volatile boolean errorOccurred
      Flag indicating if an IOException occurred during write operations.

  • Constructor Details

    • TeeOutputWriter

      public TeeOutputWriter(Writer w1, Writer w2)
      Constructs a new TeeOutputWriter.
      Parameters:
      w1 - The primary writer (usually the NetBeans output writer).
      w2 - The secondary writer (the internal buffer).

  • Method Details

    • handleException

      private void handleException(IOException e)
      Handles IOExceptions by logging them once to prevent log flooding.
      Parameters:
      e - The exception to handle.

    • write

      public void write(int c)

      Writes a character to both underlying writers.

      Overrides:
      write in class PrintWriter

    • write

      public void write(char[] cbuf, int off, int len)

      Writes a portion of an array of characters to both underlying writers.

      Overrides:
      write in class PrintWriter

    • write

      public void write(String s, int off, int len)

      Writes a portion of a string to both underlying writers.

      Overrides:
      write in class PrintWriter

    • flush

      public void flush()

      Flushes both underlying writers.

      Specified by:
      flush in interface Flushable
      Overrides:
      flush in class PrintWriter

    • close

      public void close()

      Closes both underlying writers.

      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Specified by:
      close in interface Closeable

    • reset

      public void reset() throws IOException

      Resets the primary writer if it supports resetting.

      Specified by:
      reset in class org.openide.windows.OutputWriter
      Throws:
      IOException

    • println

      public void println(String s, org.openide.windows.OutputListener l)

      Prints a line of text to both writers, handling the optional listener for the primary writer.

      Specified by:
      println in class org.openide.windows.OutputWriter
